description: Fragment of a page in lovely handwriting mostly dealing with stories from the Bible. Deut 20:16 is quoted; Jericho is named, along with Sulayman ibn David, also Musa and Harun, and the king of the Ḥimrīyūn (?). Some of the writing is in larger letters. Possibly says "qata'if in honey" on the lower left of recto (?!). ASE.
description_he: טקסט ספרותי בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
